title: Occupational Therapy Aide
description: Fortrea is seeking an Occupational Therapy Aide for our Denver clinical research facility. You'll support occupational therapists in providing care to research participants and patients. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to contribute to clinical research while working in a patient care environment.
responsibilities: Assist occupational therapists with patient care and therapeutic activities
Prepare therapy equipment and treatment areas
Support patient documentation and data collection
Help maintain patient comfort and provide basic patient support
Maintain cleanliness and organization of therapy spaces

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; some college or healthcare training preferred
skills: Ability to follow instructions and maintain organization
Physical ability to support patients and handle equipment

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
